1.content:
(a) Stewie because his teleporter malfunctioned when he teleported back home after his vacation in New York.
(b) Tommy and his friends got lost and ended up there.
(c) somehow Stewie wasn't the only who teleported there because Maggie got lost and ended up in Quahog and so Stewie had to teleport himself and her to Springfield. So she could get back home to her family, and so Stewie could keep the return pad with him. So that there wouldn't be a way for Maggie to end up back in Quahog.
1.title: Who ends up in Springfield first?

info.description: What adventures would occur if the baby/babies from Rugrats, Family Guy, and The Simpson's meet.
info.pretty_title: Tommy and friends meet Maggie and Stewie
